fields.label: Remove this player from their seat

enterRoutine.note: This routine checks to see if there is more than 1 widget in the holder and if so, deletes the extra one.

leaveRoutine.note: There is always only 1 widget in the holder. That is the widget that is removed. This routine checks to see if the widget has left, then creates a clone of that widget to put back into the holder.

generic_demo.detail:
Header

You can put some text here. Regular text, not indented

Subheader
Optional indented text level 1 Optional indented text level 2 Optional indented text level 3. Indented text that is longer than a single line will wrap around and still be indented on the next line.

Another subheader. The table below shows how to use images. Those can be incorporated into regular text as well using the same method like this: . You can override the size of the icon by setting "width" and "height" inline like in the purple cloth below.

phase1.detail:
: If this icon is showing in the top right, that means at least one other player is modifying a value (not necessarily the same as you) at the same time. This does not affect your value changes, but a notice won't be added to the history until all players have closed the modify value window. Click on the icon to forcibly close the modify value window for all players except for yourself.

Update button: Closes this window and updates your values according to the input change. This change will not show up in the history box until all players have closed the modify value window.

Change by: You may type a positive or negative value here, and this difference will automatically apply to the 'Set to' value next to it.

Set Total to: You may type any value here to indicate the total value, and this will automatically calculate the difference and show this as the 'Change by' value next to it.

+/- buttons: Click these buttons to add or subtract 1/5 value from the 'Set Total to' & 'Change by' values.

thenRoutine.note: This stops an update print when resetting a SET counter

fields.label: Choose cursor style for all players.
Check this box and click the green button to reset the game.

thenRoutine.note: Reset all counters to their default values

generic_demo.hintText:
Player Turn
Perform the following steps:
1. Recover White Funds
2. Countdown & Claim
3. Bid OR Recover Grey Funds
4. Place a disc from turn button onto empty white square

 Endgame
Game ends at end of turn if:
• Any player placed all claims
• All 25 spaces have a claim

Scoring (automatic)
• # each top-most claim
• 1vp per taken disc
• -1vp per unplaced claim

info.description: Win multi-round auctions to buy the best positioned blocks.
info.helpText:
Players take seats. Press the Setup button to begin. A random player (indicated by a button next to the seat area) is chosen to start.

Drag and drop money tokens to place them. Click +/- on each money token to change the amount in that stack. Double click on a disc to move it to your scoring holder. Click and drag the circular claim tokens to place them on the board. Click the "Click to end turn" button between all turns. Victory points are automatically calculated.
